public_reputation: Sheresh warden associated with survival authority, archive protection, and cold-region operational command at Crystalline Vault.
appearance: Warden Talar Icepulse usually presents in frost-touched garments dusted with harmless arcane residue, with details that make their warden status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Carries the habits of a warden whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Crystalline Vault.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of warden in and around Crystalline Vault, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystalline Vault workable through the obligations of warden while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of warden credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Crystalline Vault.

adventure_hooks.summary: Warden Talar Icepulse can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Crystalline Vault.
Warden Talar Icepulse becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a warden.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Warden Talar Icepulse is readable as a warden tied to Crystalline Vault.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystalline Vault: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Warden Talar Icepulse presents as someone shaped by the duties of a warden and the daily pressures of Crystalline Vault.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a warden, and proof that strangers will not make Crystalline Vault harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Warden Talar Icepulse refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a warden too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Warden Talar Icepulse can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Warden Talar Icepulse adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Warden Talar Icepulse always knows more about Crystalline Vault than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to warden duties in Crystalline Vault.
